So, for t to be a subsequence of s after some deletions, the remaining characters in t must appear in s in the same order.

The problem allows me to remove any number of characters from t. The score is based on the range of indices I remove. I want to minimize this score. So, I need to find a way to remove as few characters as possible, but also have the smallest possible range of indices removed.
